metadata.preview:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

input.newString:
assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('HELLOWORLD', 'title'), 'HELLOWORLD')

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T19-55-04-956Z/dcp-feature-add-small-2/repo/bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T19-55-04-956Z/dcp-feature-add-small-2/repo/bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T19-55-04-956Z/dcp-feature-add-small-2/repo/bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs
@@ -3,6 +3,8 @@
 import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'
 
 test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
   assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
+  assert.equal(formatTitle('HELLOWORLD', 'title'), 'HELLOWORLD')
+  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello, WORLD', 'title'), 'Hello, World')
   assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
 })
